symbolic_form: T_probe = T_bulk + empirical residual offset by sensor/QOI family
boundary_layer_interpretation: Represents observed mismatch between bulk model state and local TP/TW samples but does not identify a physical boundary flux or source lane.
development_layer_interpretation: Can reveal that development/reset/sensor projection matters but has no admitted Graetz/reset/source kernel.
runtime_inputs: None for prediction; use only as read-only diagnostic evidence.
forbidden_inputs: Do not use validation/holdout/external TP/TW, realized CFD wallHeatFlux, CFD mdot, hidden residual multiplier, or residual stuffed into internal Nu as runtime inputs.
current_support: D2 diagnostic transfer RMSE improved from 17.3645293096 K to 10.5253939442 K; TP transfer RMSE improved from 13.5673279702 K to 4.38159298515 K.
current_blocker: No frozen runtime-legal manifest; empirical residual offset is not source bounded.
score_decision: Do not score D2 on protected data; use as hypothesis generator.

symbolic_form: T_TP = T_bulk + sigma_q * A_source * Phi(Gz, x/D, reset, BC)
boundary_layer_interpretation: Signed wall/source forcing produces a local thermal boundary layer so the probe can be warmer or colder than bulk depending on source direction and boundary class.
development_layer_interpretation: Uses reset distance and Graetz coordinate to represent developing thermal profiles after bends, junctions, or BC changes.
runtime_inputs: Segment bulk T; setup-known source/sink sign; source-bounded A_source; Re; Pr; Gz; reset distance; sensor map.
forbidden_inputs: Do not use validation/holdout/external TP/TW during training, realized CFD wallHeatFlux as a runtime input, or empirical D2 coefficients as final closure.
current_support: MF12 formula gate lists the candidate; MF07 reset/Graetz coordinates and MF08 source signs support the hypothesis.
current_blocker: A_source formula, thermal reset labels, source/property release, and same-QOI TP projection UQ are missing.
score_decision: Predeclare and train only after source/property and projection UQ gates pass.

symbolic_form: T_TP = T_bulk + integral_upstream W(reset,x) * q_setup(s)/(mdot cp) dx
boundary_layer_interpretation: Heater/cooler/passive-wall forcing enters through legal source/sink lanes rather than an internal Nu residual.
development_layer_interpretation: Thermal memory decays or resets along the path; upstream source placement matters when flow is not fully mixed at the probe.
runtime_inputs: Runtime-legal q_setup by source family; model-predicted mdot; released cp_J_kg_K; axial source placement; reset kernel.
forbidden_inputs: Do not use validation/holdout/external temperatures, imposed cooler duty unless admitted as setup-known, realized wallHeatFlux, CFD mdot, or residual-as-Nu as runtime inputs.
current_support: D4 segment offsets reduce diagnostic transfer RMSE by about 54 percent; MF08 signs are physically plausible.
current_blocker: Source/property and cp release absent; no reset kernel admitted.
score_decision: Highest-value successor after cp/source release; not protected-scoreable now.

symbolic_form: T_TP = T_bulk + B_profile * (T_wall_inner - T_bulk) * Psi(y_probe/R, Gz, BC)
boundary_layer_interpretation: A probe samples the radial wall-core temperature profile rather than the segment mean; wall/core contrast is the state variable.
development_layer_interpretation: Developing thermal boundary layer shape depends on probe radius, Graetz/reset state, and boundary condition class.
runtime_inputs: Predicted inner-wall or source-bounded wall-profile state; probe location; Gz; boundary class.
forbidden_inputs: Do not use validation/holdout/external temperatures, realized CFD wallHeatFlux, empirical wall-shape coefficient as final closure, or residual-as-Nu as runtime inputs.
current_support: D3 wall-shape diagnostic gate reduced transfer RMSE by about 52 percent.
current_blocker: Runtime wall-profile model and same-QOI projection UQ are not released.
score_decision: Promising wall/core projection form; hold until wall-profile basis is runtime legal.

symbolic_form: Q_wall_core = h_wc A_wc (T_wall_inner - T_core) with source-bounded h_wc or exchange envelope
boundary_layer_interpretation: Separates wall conduction and wall/core exchange from the internal Nu lane so residual heat is not hidden in a fluid-side coefficient.
development_layer_interpretation: Useful after TP projection to decide whether remaining TW residual is wall/core profile, source/sink, or passive boundary error.
runtime_inputs: Predicted wall/core states; source-bounded exchange envelope; legal wall/source inputs; same-QOI UQ.
forbidden_inputs: Do not use realized CFD wallHeatFlux as a runtime input, validation/holdout/external TW, or hidden fitted wall multiplier.
current_support: MF15/MF17 packages provide diagnostic temporal UQ context.
current_blocker: Same-label mesh/GCI, heat-flow match, runtime wall/profile basis, and source/property release are incomplete.
score_decision: Do after MF12 TP projection or as coupled train-only ablation once source gates pass.

symbolic_form: Throughflow cell plus recirculating cell with exchange mdot and heat/source lanes
boundary_layer_interpretation: Treats recirculating upcomer as a two-region exchange problem instead of forcing ordinary single-stream Nu/K behavior.
development_layer_interpretation: Captures localized recirculation, residence time, and incomplete mixing that alter local TP and wall/core fields.
runtime_inputs: Throughflow prediction; guarded exchange-cell state; source-side heat path; same-label mesh/GCI QOIs.
forbidden_inputs: Do not use ordinary upcomer Nu/f_D/K on recirculating rows, realized Q_wall_W as released runtime input, or protected TP/TW for training.
current_support: S13 diagnostic exchange/tau evidence and recirculation fraction evidence exist.
current_blocker: Production harvest, same-label mesh/GCI, Q_wall/source-property release, and coefficient basis are blocked.
score_decision: Do not score now; use after S13 exact-label and source/Qwall gates unlock.
